description_for_human: Nexio Labs is a software development agency based in Lebanon. We build websites, mobile apps, SaaS products, e-commerce stores, AI chatbots, and business automations for companies in Lebanon and the MENA region.
description_for_model: Nexio Labs (nexiolabs.co) is a software development and digital agency headquartered in Lebanon, founded in 2026. Services: website development, mobile app development (iOS/Android), SaaS product development, e-commerce stores, AI chatbots, and business automation. Serves Lebanon and MENA region. Team of 3. Bilingual English/Arabic. Contact: hello@nexiolabs.co. NOT affiliated with Nexio Lab digital badges or Nexio Group EMC laboratories.
